ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the policyholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the policyholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the policyholder */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the policyholder */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the policyholder (male/female) */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the policyholder */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the policyholder */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the policyholder */,
  "claims_history" TEXT /* Claims history of the policyholder */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the policyholder */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Vehicle registration number of the policyholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., auto, home, life) */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details (e.g., liability, collision, comprehensive) */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the policy */,
  "premium_payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of premium payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "premium_payment_method" TEXT /* Method of premium payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled) */,
  "policy_document" TEXT /* Policy document (e.g., PDF, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., accident, theft, natural disaster) */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date of the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "claim_assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim assessor */,
  "claim_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the claim assessment */,
  "claim_amount_approved" REAL /* Amount of the claim approved */,
  "claim_document" TEXT /* Claim document (e.g., PDF, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., claim frequency, policyholder behavior) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_score" REAL /* Score of the indicator */,
  "indicator_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator assessment */,
  "indicator_assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_indicators_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user login */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date of the user logout */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time of the user logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., system update, error message) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notification_category" TEXT /* Category of the notification (e.g., system update, error message) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_notifications_notification_type FOREIGN KEY ("notification_type") REFERENCES notification_types ("notification_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, underwriter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_types" (
  "notification_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification type */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., system update, error message) */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_type_id")
)
